items.title: BBC in Cuba as island plunged into darkness
items.dek: More than 10 million people are enduring power cuts after Cuba's national electrical grid collapsed again.

items.title: 'Nice hobby to have': Kentucky's Jayden Quaintance uses manga comics to fuel recovery in March Madness
items.dek: The Kentucky forward has gotten into manga as a way to help time pass while he heals from injury.
